hero.name: Abu Shaif Khan
hero.title: IT & Network Specialist
hero.tagline: Designing Secure, Scalable, and High-Performance IT Infrastructure.
hero.description: Experienced IT & Network Specialist with expertise in enterprise networking, system administration, cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and IT operations. Passionate about delivering reliable, secure, and efficient technology solutions for modern businesses.

experiences.title: Senior Network Engineer
responsibilities: Managed and maintained enterprise-wide network infrastructure, catering to over 500+ daily endpoints.
Configured and installed Cisco switches, Cisco routers, and Fortinet Firewalls to ensure zero unauthorized intrusion.
Designed and implemented secure corporate security policies, Active Directory structures, and group policies.
Reduced network system downtime by 40% through strict configurations of PRTG monitoring, routing failsafes, and VLAN zoning.
Administered virtual infrastructure hosted on VMware ESXi hosts and Windows Server Hyper-V environments.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering
education.description: Graduated with honors. Specialized in Computer Networking, Cryptography, and Advanced Database Systems. Active core member of the University IT Club.
